questionHtml:
Approximately 92 % of the labour force are employed in agriculture, which contributes 40 % of Burundi’s GDP.

Explain why dependence on primary sector production may be considered a barrier to economic development.
markschemeHtml: N.B. A response that links only to growth can be awarded a maximum of [3]. Similarly, if development is merely stated, but not linked, then a maximum of [3] is awarded.

meta.title: Explain why dependence on primary sector production may be considered a barrier to economic development.
breadcrumbLabels: 4.9 Barriers to economic growth and/or economic development
